이사야 24:1.content: Behold, Yahweh makes the earth empty, makes it waste, turns it upside down, and scatters its inhabitants.

이사야 24:2.content: It will be as with the people, so with the priest; as with the servant, so with his master; as with the maid, so with her mistress; as with the buyer, so with the seller; as with the creditor, so with the debtor; as with the taker of interest, so with the giver of interest.

이사야 24:3.content: The earth will be utterly emptied and utterly laid waste; for Yahweh has spoken this word.

이사야 24:4.content: The earth mourns and fades away. The world languishes and fades away. The lofty people of the earth languish.

이사야 24:5.content: The earth also is polluted under its inhabitants, because they have transgressed the laws, violated the statutes, and broken the everlasting covenant.

이사야 24:6.content: Therefore the curse has devoured the earth, and those who dwell therein are found guilty. Therefore the inhabitants of the earth are burned, and few men are left.

이사야 24:7.content: The new wine mourns. The vine languishes. All the merry-hearted sigh.

이사야 24:8.content: The mirth of tambourines ceases. The sound of those who rejoice ends. The joy of the harp ceases.

이사야 24:9.content: They will not drink wine with a song. Strong drink will be bitter to those who drink it.

이사야 24:10.content: The confused city is broken down. Every house is shut up, that no man may come in.

이사야 24:11.content: There is a crying in the streets because of the wine. All joy is darkened. The mirth of the land is gone.

이사야 24:12.content: The city is left in desolation, and the gate is struck with destruction.

이사야 24:13.content: For it will be so within the earth among the peoples, as the shaking of an olive tree, as the gleanings when the vintage is done.

이사야 24:14.content: These shall lift up their voice. They will shout for the majesty of Yahweh. They cry aloud from the sea.

이사야 24:15.content: Therefore glorify Yahweh in the east, even the name of Yahweh, the God of Israel, in the islands of the sea!

이사야 24:16.content: From the uttermost part of the earth have we heard songs. Glory to the righteous! But I said, “I pine away! I pine away! woe is me!” The treacherous have dealt treacherously. Yes, the treacherous have dealt very treacherously.

이사야 24:17.content: Fear, the pit, and the snare, are on you who inhabit the earth.

이사야 24:18.content: It will happen that he who flees from the noise of the fear will fall into the pit; and he who comes up out of the middle of the pit will be taken in the snare; for the windows on high are opened, and the foundations of the earth tremble.

이사야 24:19.content: The earth is utterly broken. The earth is torn apart. The earth is shaken violently.

이사야 24:20.content: The earth will stagger like a drunken man, and will sway back and forth like a hammock. Its disobedience will be heavy on it, and it will fall and not rise again.

이사야 24:21.content: It will happen in that day that Yahweh will punish the army of the high ones on high, and the kings of the earth on the earth.

이사야 24:22.content: They will be gathered together, as prisoners are gathered in the pit, and will be shut up in the prison; and after many days they will be visited.

이사야 24:23.content: Then the moon will be confounded, and the sun ashamed; for Yahweh of Armies will reign on Mount Zion, and in Jerusalem; and glory will be before his elders.
